_doc: Copy this to <slug>.json and set building_name to EXACTLY match the building's name in the app. local_server.py merges this over the on-demand request, so floor-pagination / selectors are restored. Files starting with _ are ignored. See story_of_midtown.json for a working example.
next_button_selector: CSS selector for the floor 'next' arrow (drives pagination)
content_selector: optional: CSS selector that wraps the unit cards
shadow_host_selector: optional: web-component host if the widget uses shadow DOM
notes: What this site needs and why.
